issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks in post-referral and other workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were being enrolled in workflows multiple times, causing HAs and TCs to receive duplicate tasks. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations, which HubSpot support helped resolve. All LS leads should have only been receiving a single set of tasks.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close out or reassign the duplicate tasks as needed.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-enrolling deals that previously fell out of contract
issues.desc: When a deal was marked Offer Accepted, then switched back to Referred Active or Committed due to a terminated contract, and then marked Offer Accepted again, the workflow tasks did not re-trigger for the second Offer Accepted event. The root cause was that 'deal stage = offer accepted' was missing from the re-enrollment criteria. The fix was applied by adding it back.
issues.workaround: For deals affected during the impact window, manually enroll them into the Offer Accepted workflow to ensure TC tasks are triggered.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks for deals that had already been marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The issue was with the workflow filters not correctly excluding these terminal deal stages. A tweak to the filters was applied on March 9th to resolve this.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any lingering check-in tasks received for deals already marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO reassignment
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails sent to agents continued to reference the previous LO rather than the newly assigned one. The issue was identified as a product-level data sync problem rather than a HubSpot workflow configuration issue. It was resolved by Luis.
issues.workaround: For deals where an LO change occurred during the impact window, manually verify that any outbound agent emails reflected the correct LO and resend if necessary.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow not triggering tasks for referrals made after March 18th
issues.desc: HAs did not receive any workflow tasks for a referral that was made and accepted on March 18th. The root cause was an error with how data was being pulled into the workflow, preventing it from filtering correctly. The issue was escalated to the product team.
issues.workaround: For referrals made during the impact window that missed tasks, manually enroll the deal into the post-referral workflow to ensure all required follow-up tasks are generated.

issues.title: Buyer credit SMS sent in Offer Accepted stage instead of Sale Pending with missing credit amount
issues.desc: An SMS notifying buyers of their credit amount was incorrectly triggering in the Offer Accepted deal stage, before closing information had been submitted and the credit amount could be calculated, resulting in the SMS going out without the dollar amount. The SMS should only send in the Sale Pending stage once the credit amount is known. It was confirmed to be a dashboard-triggered communication and escalated to the product team.
issues.workaround: For buyers who received the incomplete credit SMS during the impact window, manually send a follow-up communication with the correct buyer credit amount once closing information is submitted.
